The '''horseshoe droid''' was a submersible [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]]-equipped [[Droid/Legends|droid]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] on aquatic planets like [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].
